CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS EmailMessages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, sender VARCHAR(255), recipient VARCHAR(255), subject VARCHAR(255), body TEXT, received_date TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO EmailMessages (id, sender, recipient, subject, body, received_date) VALUES (1, 'alice@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Hello Bob', 'Just wanted to check in.', NOW());

INSERT INTO EmailMessages (id, sender, recipient, subject, body, received_date) VALUES (2, 'charlie@example.com', 'bob@example.com', 'Meeting Reminder', 'Don't forget our meeting tomorrow.', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day');

INSERT INTO EmailMessages (id, sender, recipient, subject, body, received_date) VALUES (3, 'dave@example.com', 'eve@example.com', 'Weekly Update', 'Here is the update for this week.', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days');
SELECT * FROM EmailMessages WHERE sender = 'alice@example.com' AND received_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EmailMessages WHERE recipient = 'bob@example.com';
SELECT DISTINCT sender FROM EmailMessages WHERE received_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month';
UPDATE EmailMessages SET body = 'Updated message content.' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM EmailMessages WHERE received_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year';
SELECT sender, COUNT(*) as message_count FROM EmailMessages GROUP BY sender HAVING message_count > 1;
SELECT e1.sender, e2.subject FROM EmailMessages e1 JOIN EmailMessages e2 ON e1.recipient = e2.sender WHERE e1.sender != e2.sender;
SELECT sender, ARRAY_AGG(subject) AS subjects FROM EmailMessages GROUP BY sender ORDER BY sender;
SELECT * FROM EmailMessages WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM EmailMessages WHERE subject LIKE '%Reminder%');

INSERT INTO EmailMessages (id, sender, recipient, subject, body, received_date) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (), 'temp@example.com', 'target@example.com', subject, body, NOW() FROM EmailMessages WHERE subject IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(LENGTH(body)) FROM EmailMessages WHERE received_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
